subject: Sound Journey Facilitator | RAV Vast Meditation Sessions
body:
Dear Mandali team,

I facilitate immersive sound journeys using RAV Vast - a resonant steel instrument with deep therapeutic tones, ideal for silence retreats and meditation practice.

My background:

  • Main stage at Drishti Beats Festival 2023 (yoga+music festival, Colorado)
  • 4-year residency facilitating sunset sessions at Villa Porta (Lake Maggiore)
  • RAV Vast endorsed artist
  • Greece's Got Talent (4 YES votes)

→ RAV Vast Sound Journey

I offer:

  • Sound bath sessions for retreat guests
  • Sunrise/sunset meditation accompaniment
  • RAV Vast introduction workshop

Your focus on silence and spiritual practice resonates deeply with my work. I'm available for 2026 collaborations.

Warm regards,
Flutur
RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
linktr.ee/flutur

subject: Artist Application | Wellbeing Festival July 2026 | Sound Journey Facilitator
body:
Dear Wellbeing Festival team,

I noticed Nikolaos Unalome facilitated Sound Healing at your 2025 edition. I'd love to contribute to the 2026 festival.

My background:

  • Main stage at Drishti Beats Festival 2023 (yoga+music festival, Aspen/Colorado)
  • Collab with Equanimous (100M+ streams, Gravitas Recordings)
  • 4-year residency creating sunset ceremonies at Lake Maggiore luxury hotel
  • RAV Vast endorsed artist
  • Greece's Got Talent (4 YES votes)

→ Sound Journey Sample

I can offer:

  • Sound bath / meditation sessions
  • Accompaniment at the UNESCO site
  • Workshop: Introduction to RAV Vast & Sound Meditation

Being Greek-speaking and available for the full July 3-13 window.

In gratitude,
Flutur
RAV Vast Endorsed Artist

subject: RAV Vast Endorsed Artist | Pangonia 2026 + Monthly Meetups
body:
Dear Pangonia team,

RAV Vast endorsed artist here. I'd love to connect with the Pangonia community - both for the 2026 festival and your monthly Berlin meetups.

My journey:

  • Main stage at Drishti Beats Festival 2023 (yoga+music, Colorado) - alongside IHF who's played Coachella & Electric Forest
  • Collab with Equanimous (Gravitas Recordings, 100M+ streams)
  • 4-year sunset ceremony residency at Lake Maggiore hotel
  • Greece's Got Talent (4 YES votes)
  • Live looping: RAV Vast + guitar + vocals + drums (versatile setup)

→ Who Is Flutur - My Journey
→ RAV Vast Sound Journey

I'd love to:

  • Join a monthly meetup first to connect with the community
  • Offer a sunset concert slot or sound journey at Pangonia 2026
  • Facilitate a workshop: Live Looping with RAV Vast

When is the next Berlin meetup?

Warm regards,
Flutur
RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
linktr.ee/flutur

subject: Artist Application | Healing Stage | Sound Journey + Workshop

subject: Sunset Concert Fusion | RAV Vast + Electronic | Booking Inquiry
body:
Hi Sunset Hill team,

I discovered your "Sunset Concert Fusion" series - classical/neoclassical/ambient electronic meets sunset. This is exactly my sound.

My format: RAV Vast (steel tongue drum) + live looping + electronic elements via Ableton Push. Ambient electronic meets live acoustic.

Background:

  • Main stage at Drishti Beats Festival 2023 (yoga+music, Colorado)
  • 4-year sunset session residency at Lake Maggiore luxury hotel
  • RAV Vast endorsed artist
  • Collab with Equanimous (Anjunadeep/Gravitas vibe)

→ Sunset Sound - RAV on Melodic House

Available for 2026 booking - open to residency or series of sessions.

Warm regards,
Flutur
RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
linktr.ee/flutur
